edge_recon_action_superseded_ck.name: edge_recon_action_superseded_ck
edge_recon_action_superseded_ck.value: ("edge_reconciliation_log"."action" = 'SUPERSEDE' AND "edge_reconciliation_log"."superseded_edge_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("edge_reconciliation_log"."action" = 'KEEP_BOTH' AND "edge_reconciliation_log"."superseded_edge_id" IS NULL)

event_subscription_checkpoint_claim_shap.name: event_subscription_checkpoint_claim_shape
event_subscription_checkpoint_claim_shap.value:
("event_subscription_checkpoint"."claim_owner" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_checkpoint"."claim_token" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_checkpoint"."claim_lease_until" IS NULL)
        OR ("event_subscription_checkpoint"."claim_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_checkpoint"."claim_token" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_checkpoint"."claim_lease_until" IS NOT NULL)

event_subscription_delivery_claim_shape.name: event_subscription_delivery_claim_shape
event_subscription_delivery_claim_shape.value:
(("event_subscription_delivery"."claim_owner" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_delivery"."claim_token" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_delivery"."claim_lease_until" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_delivery"."claimed_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("event_subscription_delivery"."claim_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_delivery"."claim_token" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_delivery"."claim_lease_until" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_delivery"."claimed_at" IS NOT NULL))
        AND (("event_subscription_delivery"."status" = 'claimed') = ("event_subscription_delivery"."claim_owner" IS NOT NULL))

event_subscription_effect_provenance_sha.name: event_subscription_effect_provenance_shape
event_subscription_effect_provenance_sha.value:
("event_subscription_effect"."subscriber_id" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_effect"."subscriber_version" IS NULL AND "event_subscription_effect"."source_event_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("event_subscription_effect"."subscriber_id" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_effect"."subscriber_version" IS NOT NULL AND "event_subscription_effect"."subscriber_version" > 0 AND "event_subscription_effect"."source_event_id" IS NOT NULL)

hub_sync_claim_shape_check.name: hub_sync_claim_shape_check
hub_sync_claim_shape_check.value: (("hub_sync_reconciliation"."status" in ('claimed','applying')) = ("hub_sync_reconciliation"."claim_owner" is not null and "hub_sync_reconciliation"."claim_token" is not null and "hub_sync_reconciliation"."lease_expires_at" is not null))

misconception_recon_action_superseded_ck.name: misconception_recon_action_superseded_ck
misconception_recon_action_superseded_ck.value: ("misconception_reconciliation_log"."action" = 'SUPERSEDE' AND "misconception_reconciliation_log"."superseded_edge_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("misconception_reconciliation_log"."action" = 'KEEP_BOTH' AND "misconception_reconciliation_log"."superseded_edge_id" IS NULL)

placement_starter_claim_terminal_timesta.name: placement_starter_claim_terminal_timestamps
placement_starter_claim_terminal_timesta.value: ("placement_starter_claim"."status" = 'satisfied') = ("placement_starter_claim"."satisfied_at" IS NOT NULL) AND ("placement_starter_claim"."status" = 'exhausted') = ("placement_starter_claim"."exhausted_at" IS NOT NULL)
